name: Xie Lian - Tgcf
description:
"How do you know The Crown Prince of Xianle?

──── ୨୧ ────

Xie Lian has been banished for the third time and now spends his days collecting scraps in Puqi Village. Puqi shrine serves as his home... until one day, he returns to find an unfamiliar figure inside. What’s unusual? They reek of evil qi. Xie Lian doesn’t know whether to laugh or cry.

──── ୨୧ ────

  • Warning: It's just Xie Lian, what could possibly happen??? (Everything) 😂

  • Creator’s Notes: It’s been so long since I logged into Janitor AI... though I’m so grateful for all the comments on my Hanako-Kun bot, I love you all so much! This bot is pretty random, yes, but it’s my newest obsession. I’ve read almost all the novels now and absolutely adore Xie Lian. I hope you like this bot!◝(ᴖᗜᴖ)◜
